dashboard.title: Dashboard
monitoring.title: Hardware Monitoring
opt.title: Windows Optimization
opt.subtitle: Every tweak is previewable, reversible and backed up before it is applied.
opt.power.title: High performance power plan
opt.power.desc: Switches the active power plan to High performance. The previous plan is recorded and restored on undo.
opt.gamemode.title: Windows Game Mode
opt.gamemode.desc: Enables Windows Game Mode so the OS prioritizes the running game.
opt.background.title: Reduce background apps
opt.background.desc: Disables UWP background app access globally for the current user.
opt.scheduling.title: Gaming CPU scheduling
opt.scheduling.desc: Tunes Win32PrioritySeparation for short, variable quanta favoring foreground apps.
opt.latency.title: Latency improvements
opt.latency.desc: Raises multimedia responsiveness and removes network throttling for lower input latency.
opt.gpusched.title: Hardware GPU scheduling
opt.cpupriority.title: Game task priority
opt.cpupriority.desc: Raises the multimedia scheduler priority class for games.
ram.title: RAM Cleaner
ram.safety_note: Protected system processes (csrss, lsass, dwm, ...) are never touched. Trimmed pages reload transparently from the page file — no application is closed or crashed.
temp.title: Temp Cleaner
temp.hint: Choose a mode and click Scan to find cleanable files.
profiles.title: Gaming Profiles
profiles.failed: Some actions failed — check the logs.
profile.competitive.name: Competitive FPS
profile.competitive.desc: Lowest input latency for competitive shooters: high performance power, scheduling and latency tweaks.
profile.maxfps.name: Maximum FPS
profile.maxfps.desc: Every safe optimization enabled, including hardware GPU scheduling, for the highest frame rate.
profile.balanced.name: Balanced
profile.balanced.desc: Light touch: Game Mode and latency improvements only.
profile.streaming.name: Streaming
profile.streaming.desc: Keeps encoder headroom while gaming: performance power plan and foreground scheduling.
profile.lowend.name: Low-End PC
profile.lowend.desc: Frees resources on weak hardware by cutting background apps.
profile.laptop.name: Laptop
profile.laptop.desc: Battery-friendly: Game Mode and background reduction without forcing high power draw.
bench.title: Benchmark
bench.baseline_set: Baseline saved — run again after optimizing to compare.
recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.empty: No recovery points yet. They are created automatically before optimizations.
boost.title: Cool & Optimize
boost.subtitle: Safely lowers temperature and background load without disturbing the app you are using — no in-game performance loss.
settings.start_minimized: Start minimized to the system tray
profiles.name: Profile name
profiles.preview_subtitle: These are the exact changes this profile would apply:
bench.subtitle: Runs a short CPU, memory and latency benchmark to estimate gaming performance.
settings.title: Settings
settings.restore_point: Create a restore point before optimizations
logs.title: Logs
updates.title: Updates
ram.auto_desc: Periodically trims working sets and purges the standby list in the background.
opt.ultimate.title: Ultimate Performance power plan
opt.ultimate.desc: Activates the hidden Ultimate Performance plan for maximum responsiveness on high-end desktops. Created on demand from its template.
opt.saver.title: Power Saver plan
opt.saver.desc: Switches to the Power Saver plan to extend battery life on laptops and low-power machines.
opt.visualfx.title: Performance visual effects
opt.visualfx.desc: Disables animations, shadows and fades for a snappier desktop on older hardware.
opt.menudelay.title: Remove menu show delay
opt.menudelay.desc: Sets the menu show delay to zero so menus open instantly.
opt.transparency.title: Disable transparency effects
opt.transparency.desc: Turns off window transparency to save GPU and improve responsiveness.
opt.nagle.title: Disable Nagle's algorithm
opt.nagle.desc: Reduces network latency for real-time games by disabling TCP packet coalescing.
opt.telemetry.title: Reduce telemetry
opt.telemetry.desc: Lowers Windows diagnostic data collection to the minimum allowed level.
profile.ultimate.name: Ultimate Performance
profile.ultimate.desc: Everything enabled, including the Ultimate Performance power plan and visual-effect trimming — the absolute maximum for high-end rigs.
profile.battery.name: Battery Saver
profile.battery.desc: Maximizes battery life: power-saver plan, reduced background apps and visual effects, transparency off.
profiles.edit_actions: Select the actions this profile applies:
settings.close_tray: Close to system tray instead of exiting
settings.auto_ram_enable: Clean RAM automatically on an interval
tray.minimized: BKKleaner is still running in the system tray.
updates.no_winget: Windows Package Manager (winget) is not available — app updates require it. Install "App Installer" from the Microsoft Store.
updates.hint: Click "Check for updates" to scan installed apps and runtimes.
